title: Lex Weaver
text: Home * People * Lex Weaver Lex Weaver , an Australian computer scientist, since 2004 manager at the Australian Government , and before lecturer in the Department of Computer Science at the Australian National University , Canberra , Australia, where he already defended his B.Sc. and Ph.D. degrees in 1994 and 2003 respectively [1] . Lex Weaver researched on machine learning and in particular Temporal Difference Learning , and co-authored of the chess program KnightCap along with Jonathan Baxter and Andrew Tridgell [2] .
